basic_details.job_title: MDU Rohtak Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Maharshi Dayanand University Rohtak (MDU Rohtak) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released for the recruitment of 1 Research Assistant post. The notification is available on the official website of MDU Rohtak, inviting eligible candidates to participate in the walk-in recruitment process.

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate in social science discipline (55% minimum) with NET /M.Phil. / Ph.D.
qualification.details: Post graduate in social science discipline (55% minimum) with NET /M.Phil. / Ph.D.

all_official_links.label: Download MDU Rohtak Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MDU Rohtak Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date for application via email is 18th June 2026. Candidates are encouraged to submit their applications well in advance.

faq.question: Q2. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Research Assistant position at MDU Rohtak is scheduled for 19th June 2026. Candidates should arrive at the venue on time.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: To be eligible, candidates must have a postgraduate degree in a social science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks, along with NET, M.Phil., or Ph.D. qualification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Research Assistant.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the Walk-in Interview be held?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at Maharshi Dayanand University Rohtak, Haryana, Pin code: 124001.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant certificates.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at Maharshi Dayanand University Rohtak.
